tasks.label: Build + flash M5
tasks.command: bash -c "python3 pack.py flash 0 0 && mpremote cp flash.json :/flash/apps/firmware_updater/update.json  && mpremote exec \"print('Importing firmware update...'); exec(open('/flash/apps/firmware_updater/core.py', 'r').read());  print('Installing firmware...'); install_firmware('/flash/apps/firmware_updater/update.json'); import main\""
